reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(1)(ii)(D) focuses on reviewing information system activity, which aligns with Kubernetes audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes provides audit logs that can be configured to capture detailed information about API server requests and activities. These logs can be used to review system activity, similar to cloud audit services like CloudTrail. Ensuring audit logging is enabled, properly configured to capture necessary metadata, and retained for analysis are critical components of meeting this control.
title: 164_308_a_1_ii_d: 164.308(a)(1)(ii)(D) Information system activity review
